mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE reply_tree AS ( SELECT replyNo, boardMyhomeArticleNo, memberId, replyParentNo, replyContents, replyUpdated, 1 AS LVL FROM reply WHERE boardMyhomeArticleNo = #{boardMyhomeArticleNo} AND replyParentNo = 0 UNION ALL SELECT r.replyNo, r.boardMyhomeArticleNo, r.memberId, r.replyParentNo, r.replyContents, r.replyUpdated, rt.LVL + 1 FROM reply r INNER JOIN reply_tree rt ON r.replyParentNo = rt.replyNo ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY replyUpdated DESC) AS recNum, rt.LVL, rt.replyNo, rt.boardMyhomeArticleNo, rt.memberId, m.memberNickname, m.memberImage, rt.replyParentNo, rt.replyContents, rt.replyUpdated FROM reply_tree rt JOIN member m ON rt.memberId = m.memberId WHERE recNum BETWEEN (#{pageNum}-1)*10 + 1 AND #{pageNum}*10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply(replyNo, boardMyhomeArticleNo, memberId, replyContents) VALUES(nextval('REPLY_SEQ'), #{boardMyhomeArticleNo}, #{memberId}, #{replyContents})
INSERT INTO reply(replyNo, boardMyhomeArticleNo, replyParentNo, memberId, replyContents) VALUES(nextval('REPLY_SEQ'), #{boardMyhomeArticleNo}, #{replyParentNo}, #{memberId}, #{replyContents})
